name: Vikram Nair
coach_notes: mutton curry and rice for dinner
column16: Feeling very heavy and tired today. Boss called a surprise review. Did not sleep well at all. Forgot my tablet in the morning rush.
column17: Third consecutive day of stress score 5. FBS has been 195 then 208 now 218. Medication missed again today. No exercise in 5 days.

name: Sunita Reddy
food_diary: Idli sambar for breakfast. Dal rice for lunch. Skipped dinner due to headache.
free_text: Headache since this morning. Did a short walk but stopped as headache got worse. Feeling a bit dizzy too.
coach_notes: Week 6. FBS above medium threshold. Headache and dizziness noted — worth a check.

name: Ramesh Pillai
food_diary: Dosa with coconut chutney. Fried rice for lunch. Biscuits and tea in evening.
free_text: Skipped walk again. Feeling low on energy. Not sleeping well because of back pain.
coach_notes: Week 9. FBS elevated. Exercise zero for 4th day. Back pain affecting sleep. Needs follow-up call.

name: Kavitha Subramaniam
food_diary: Oats and banana for breakfast. Grilled chicken salad for lunch. Dal sabzi and one chapati for dinner.
free_text: Good day overall. Walk done in the morning. Feeling energetic.
coach_notes: Week 12. Consistent performer. FBS trending down — was 138 at start.

name: Anand Krishnan
food_diary: Upma for breakfast. Rice curd for lunch. Chapati and dal for dinner.
free_text: Okay day. Did some walking. Nothing special to report.
coach_notes: Week 7. FBS in medium range. Exercise below target. Stable but not improving.

name: Meera Iyer
free_text: No log submitted today. Third consecutive missed day.
coach_notes: Week 3. New patient. Not submitting logs. Need to call and check in.
